name: Caches
description: Scattered vital caches contain valuable assets. Recover them before the opposition, but each claim triggers alert protocols that escalate the battlefield's danger.

scoringRules.description: +1 VP immediately for each VC extracted
+1 VP to Side that triggered maximum Threat Level

specialRules.name: Harvest
specialRules.description: Acquire VC: 1 AP Fiddle action. Extract VC: 1 AP while in base-contact with battlefield edge

specialRules.name: Catalyst (Threat Level)
specialRules.description: Each extraction increases Threat Level. Level 2+: -1 Range Combat Hit. Level 4+: -1 Close Combat Hit. Max: Hard Cover degrades to Soft

config.level2Effect: -1 Base die Range Combat Hit Tests
config.level4Effect: -1 Base die Close Combat Hit Tests
config.maxEffect: Hard Cover degrades to Soft Cover

specialRules.name: Hidden Caches
specialRules.description: Roll 1d6 per VC; on 4+ the VC begins Hidden (revealed within 4 MU)
